races.name: Human
advantages: Learn trades faster (downtime reduced by 1 week)
races.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans can grow strong in any direction they choose.

races.name: Dwarf
advantages: Magic Resistance (advantage on saves vs magic)
races.description: Hardy folk of stone and steel, resistant to magic but unable to benefit from it.

races.name: Elf
advantages: Nature-Smithing (grow items from plants, -2 crafting DC)
races.description: Long-lived and attuned to nature and magic alike.

races.name: Gnome
races.weakness: Can only carry 25% of body weight
races.description: Small, clever inventors with a knack for tools and devices.

races.name: Drakari
races.description: Draconic-blooded people with innate elemental power.

races.name: Umbrin
races.weakness: Disadvantage on checks in bright light
races.description: Shadow-dwelling people gifted with stealth and night vision.

races.name: Marai
advantages: Echo pulse (detect hidden creatures within 60 ft)
races.weakness: Must submerge every 48 hours or suffer fatigue
races.description: Aquatic people equally at home on land and underwater.

races.name: Ashborn
advantages: Auto-stabilize at 0 HP once per day
Deal +1 fire damage with melee attacks
races.description: Born of flame and ash, resilient even at the brink of death.

races.name: Etherial
advantages: Teleport 10 ft as reaction once per rest
Advantage on saves vs mental effects
races.description: Otherworldly beings of pure arcane essence.
